raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "providing conditional guidance or suggestion within an autosuggestion framework to promote relaxation and sleep by reducing deliberate effort",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "effort to sleep creates tension or prevents quiet lying",
    "absence of effort naturally results in lying quietly",
    "lying quietly is the desired or effective state in bed"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a simple conditional but relies on an unstated causal assumption about effort versus relaxation that may not hold universally",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient experiences sleep difficulty due to performance anxiety or excessive effort, and the suggestion reduces that tension enough to allow natural sleep onset",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "sleep issues stem from physiological causes, pain, or external factors rather than effort, rendering the advice ineffective or dismissive of real problems"
}
